title: Middleware & Provider Options
description: Developer customises the AI request pipeline using middleware and provider-specific options (temperature, max tokens, etc.).

use_cases.name: Implement HasMiddleware on an Agent
use_cases.description: Agent class implements HasMiddleware interface and returns an ordered array of middleware from middleware(): array.

use_cases.name: Generate Agent Middleware Scaffold
use_cases.description: Run artisan make:agent-middleware {Name} [-f] to scaffold a new middleware class under App\Ai\Middleware. Uses stubs/agent-middleware.stub.

use_cases.name: Write Custom Middleware Logic
use_cases.description: Implement handle(AgentPrompt $prompt, Closure $next) in the generated middleware. Can modify prompt before calling $next($prompt) and/or act on AgentResponse in the ->then() callback.

use_cases.name: Implement HasProviderOptions on an Agent
use_cases.description: Agent class implements HasProviderOptions and returns provider-keyed option arrays (e.g. thinking mode for Anthropic, extra params for OpenAI).
use_cases.parameter: Lab enum or plain string provider identifier

use_cases.name: Configure Generation Options via PHP Attributes
use_cases.description: Annotate agent class with #[MaxSteps(n)], #[MaxTokens(n)], #[Temperature(f)] PHP attributes. TextGenerationOptions::forAgent() reads them via ReflectionClass.

use_cases.name: Pipeline Runs Middleware Stack
use_cases.description: On prompt(), gatherMiddlewareFor(Agent) assembles the middleware array (fake-gateway interceptor + optional RememberConversation + agent's own middleware) and passes it to the Laravel pipeline.
call_chain: gatherMiddlewareFor(Agent): collects RememberConversation if agent uses RemembersConversations trait, then spreads agent->middleware() if HasMiddleware

use_cases.name: Provider Reads providerOptions at Request Build Time
use_cases.description: Each provider's BuildsTextRequests trait calls $options->providerOptions(Lab::XYZ) to obtain provider-specific keys (e.g. 'thinking' for Anthropic extended thinking). These are merged into the HTTP request body.
call_chain: → BuildsTextRequests merges result into request body via array_merge($body, $providerOptions)

use_cases.name: Built-in RememberConversation Middleware
use_cases.description: Automatically injected when agent uses RemembersConversations trait AND has a conversation participant. Stores user & assistant messages via ConversationStore and attaches conversation ID to the response.
key_methods: handle(AgentPrompt, Closure $next): stores conversation + messages after $next()
generateTitle(string $prompt): string — calls cheapest text model for a 3-5 word title

key_relationships: TextGenerationOptions::forAgent reads PHP attributes MaxSteps, MaxTokens, Temperature via Reflection
Pipeline wraps all middleware execution in GeneratesText::prompt()
important_notes: ProviderOptionsAgent is NOT a concrete class in the codebase — it is the conceptual role of an Agent that implements HasProviderOptions.
Middleware follow Laravel pipeline pattern: handle(AgentPrompt $prompt, Closure $next).
providerOptions() receives a Lab enum (Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini, Groq, Mistral, DeepSeek, xAI, OpenRouter, Ollama, Azure, Cohere, Jina, VoyageAI, ElevenLabs) or plain string.
Anthropic provider merges providerOptions last via array_merge, enabling keys like 'thinking' to override defaults.
Temperature and MaxTokens can be set both via PHP attributes (static, on class) and via providerOptions (dynamic, per-provider).
